---
title: "Natural Resource Management"
subtitle: "Conservation, valuation, and sustainable management of Earth's resources."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include natural-resource-management/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Natural Resource Management** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include natural-resource-management/01-natural-resource-base.md >}}

{{< include natural-resource-management/02-property-regimes-and-commons.md >}}

{{< include natural-resource-management/03-resource-management-strategies.md >}}

{{< include natural-resource-management/04-geoinformatics-in-nrm.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include natural-resource-management/05-quick-reference.md >}}

---
